[Cfif. ~\ Z~"25016/2/201H:lT -Qs Q'r (C.I(>I)(~ Hlj] ···¥~~T ~mt,~.~ ~ :-~ {1\51(flld) m (~'fiT ~ W ~) ~, 2008 lI1ffi=f ~ ~q:rrFl, mw cF ~ cF m II, zsi5 3, 3"ll-m (i) rFlS R\ftkF(, 2008 R ~. m.'fiT,fi{. -:838(31) -m-r.~ ~ 'JTQ' ~ .3iR ~. ffT.q'if.fo:i.950(31) 3 fC\ftkl{, 2016, ~. m.'fiT:~. 15(3-f} 12 31ufCTfr, 2011, ~. ffT.m.f.'t. 756(31), 12 ~, 2C)11 3-fR ~. m.m:~. 718(3:f} 16 RlftCkl{, 2013 c)1 Gffi ~~~ ~ 'JTQ' ~I MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWA YS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 16th January, 2014 G.S.R. 26(E).-In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 9 of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), the Central Government hereby makes the following rilles further to amend the National Highways Fee (Determination of Rates and Collection) Rules, 2008, namely :~ .. 1. Short title and commencement.-( I) These rules may' be called the National Highways Fee (Determination of Rates and Collection) Amendment Rules, 2014:' (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the National Highways Fee (Determination of Rates and Collection) Rules, 2008 (hereinafter referred to as the principal rules),- . (a) in rule 4, sub-rule (10) shall be substituted, namely; . . "The rate of fee for use o{ standalo,ne. structure as well. as structure. forming- part of·a, liner highway/expressway, shall be calculated by converting the length of the structure into-an equivalent length of highway/expressway by multiplying by a factor of ten. Provided that structure of 60 meters of length or less, on a linear highway/expressway will be considered as part of the norrnallength of highways/expressways for calculation of'fee.". [F. No. H-250l6/2/2011~P&P(Toll) (Vol. III)] ALKESH'SHARMA, JL Secy. Note :- The Natlo~al Highways Fee (Determination of Rates and Collections) Rules, 2008 were published in the Gazette ofIndia, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i) vide No. G.S.R 838(E), dated the 5th December, 2008 and amended vide No. O.S.R. 950(E), dated 3rd December, 2010, O.S.R. 15(E), dated 12th January, 2011, No. GS.J\: :'756(E),dated 12th October, 2011 and No.O.S.R .778(E), dated 16th December; 2013.
